assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion (30-day max) for the BFCM period — blocks everything including patches
assertions.reason: Configuration shows Black Friday exclusions using scope 'NO_UPGRADES' and gcloud commands use --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope=no-upgrades for the BFCM period

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion for the June code freeze period
assertions.reason: Configuration shows June code freeze exclusions using scope 'NO_UPGRADES' in both YAML/Terraform and gcloud commands

assertions.expectation: For permanent minor version control: uses 'no minor upgrades' (scope 'no_minor') if they only want to block minor versions, or 'no minor or node upgrades' (scope 'no_minor_or_node') if they also want to stop node upgrades. May recommend persistent exclusion with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support which auto-tracks EoS date
assertions.reason: Response only disables auto-upgrade on node pools but doesn't provide proper maintenance exclusion scopes for permanent minor version control. Missing 'no_minor' or 'no_minor_or_node' scopes and --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support option

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions vs up-to-EoS for 'no minor or node upgrades'
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the 30-day maximum limitation for 'no upgrades' exclusions or the up-to-EoS duration for 'no minor or node upgrades'

assertions.expectation: Provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for each exclusion type
assertions.reason: Response provides gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope=no-upgrades flags for the exclusions

assertions.expectation: Notes that you can have a maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions, and they must allow 48h of maintenance in any 32-day window
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions or the 48-hour maintenance window requirement in any 32-day period

assertions.expectation: Mentions that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Response does not mention that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows while only auto-upgrades respect them

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Response does not warn about the risks of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
